description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick, providing a classic and sturdy appearance. Several roof peaks and dormers add architectural interest, while the front facade includes a covered entryway supported by columns and decorative gable trim. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in pairs and others standing alone. The structure includes multiple wings, suggesting a spacious interior with various rooms and possibly a garage. The overall design blends traditional and craftsman elements, making it suitable for suburban or upscale residential neighborhoods.
description: A large, single-story house with a multi-gabled dark roof, light brick walls, and a prominent covered entryway with columns and decorative trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, decorative gable trim, and a wide covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, multiple roof peaks, and a set of three windows on the end wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long facade with several windows and dormers, as well as the extension of the house's wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another wing with large window openings and the continuation of the complex roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped and single windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, decorative gable trim, and a prominent main door
